---
title: "Vagheiten"
subtitle: "Welche Herausforderungen liegen in unsicheren Forschungsdaten für die Numismatik?"
lang: de
date: today
date-modified: last-modified
date-format: "DD.MM.YYYY"
css: /assets/css/collage.css
---

{{< include fragments/vague_index_intro.inc.qmd >}}

{{< include fragments/vague_index_exercise.inc.qmd >}}
